_meta.comment: TRIKAL VAANI - CEO PROTECTION HEADER - cities.json v1.0 - Rohiit Gupta - Chief Vedic Architect - 10 cities for /[city]/panchang route - Phase B3

cities.name: Delhi NCR
cities.description: The capital region of India, including New Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, and Faridabad. Spiritual hub with ancient temples and historic significance.

cities.name: Mumbai
cities.description: Financial capital of India. Home to Siddhivinayak and Mahalakshmi temples, deeply tied to wealth and prosperity worship.

cities.name: Noida
cities.description: Modern satellite city of Delhi NCR. Hub for tech professionals seeking Vedic guidance for career and home matters.

cities.name: Gurgaon
cities.description: Millennium city named after Guru Dronacharya. Corporate hub with growing demand for spiritual and astrological guidance.

cities.name: Bangalore
cities.description: Silicon Valley of India and ancient temple city. Pleasant weather and strong Vedic tradition rooted in the Bull Temple and ISKCON.

cities.name: Hyderabad
cities.description: City of Pearls and ancient Bhagyalakshmi blessings. IT hub with deep South Indian Vedic traditions.

cities.name: Pune
cities.description: Cultural capital of Maharashtra. Sacred land of Sant Tukaram and Dnyaneshwar, home to powerful Ganesh and Bhavani temples.

cities.name: Kolkata
cities.description: City of Joy and home of Maa Kali. Spiritual heart of Bengal with the most powerful Shakti Peetha at Kalighat.

cities.name: Chennai
cities.description: Gateway to South India. Home to ancient Dravidian temples and powerful Murugan, Shiva, and Vishnu kshetras.

cities.name: Ahmedabad
cities.description: Largest city of Gujarat and birthplace of Mahatma Gandhi. Strong Jain and Vaishnava traditions.
